{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-791", "name": "Incomplete Filtering of Special Elements"}], "description": "### Summary
The optional flag `--filter-system-calls` was not applied even if specified.

### Details
This is a defense in depth feature to apply additional seccomp filters after the binary has started. The example config also sandboxes the binary with systemd.

### Impact
Reduced sandboxing of the netfoil binary.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vjgj-42f6-7997", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-29T22:23:41Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vjgj-42f6-7997", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vjgj-42f6-7997"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-29T22:23:41Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tinfoil-factory/netfoil/security/advisories/GHSA-vjgj-42f6-7997", "https://github.com/tinfoil-factory/netfoil/commit/8c84f1b03adf1df5b4e6d07a49043d13dbbf9ee1", "https://github.com/tinfoil-factory/netfoil/releases/tag/v0.2.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vjgj-42f6-7997"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tinfoil-factory/netfoil/security-advisories/GHSA-vjgj-42f6-7997", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tinfoil-factory/netfoil", "summary": "netfoil's optional seccomp sandboxing was not applied", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-29T22:23:42Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vjgj-42f6-7997", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.2.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/tinfoil-factory/netfoil"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.2.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
